title: Rebuild Coal & Curry as South Indian Multi-Cuisine Restaurant App

requirements.text: Apply a warm, vibrant South Indian-inspired visual theme throughout the entire app using a rich spice palette (saffron, turmeric, deep red, cream, dark charcoal). Use bold display typography, layered texture backgrounds, and consistent component styling that evokes authentic South Indian dining culture.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses saffron, turmeric, deep red, and cream tones consistently across all pages
Typography uses a bold, legible display font appropriate for a restaurant brand
No blue or purple colors appear in the UI

requirements.text: Build a complete South Indian multi-cuisine menu with the following categories: Starters, Dosas & Uttapam, Idly & Vada, Rice & Biryani, Curries & Gravies, Breads, Seafood Specials, Desserts, and Drinks. Each category must contain at least 4–6 realistic South Indian dishes with name, description, price (in INR), spice level, and veg/non-veg badge.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 9 menu categories are available
Each dish displays name, description, price, spice level, and veg/non-veg indicator
Sample dishes include items like Masala Dosa, Idly Sambar, Chettinad Chicken, Fish Curry, Filter Coffee, Payasam, etc.
Menu data is stored in frontend menuData.ts

requirements.text: Implement horizontally scrollable category tabs on the Menu page so users can filter dishes by category. Each tab should show a relevant emoji and the category name. The active tab should be visually distinct.
acceptanceCriteria: All menu categories appear as scrollable tabs
Selecting a tab filters the dish grid to show only items in that category
Active tab has clearly distinct styling

requirements.text: Render dish cards on the Menu page with dish image, name, short description, spice level indicator, price, veg/non-veg badge, and an 'Add to Cart' button. Images should use generated dish images stored in frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: Dish cards with images, descriptions, and prices

acceptanceCriteria: Each dish card displays all required fields
Add to Cart button increments the cart count in the navbar
Veg items show a green badge; non-veg items show a red badge

requirements.text: Implement a shopping cart with the ability to add/remove dishes, adjust quantities, and view a subtotal. The cart should persist via localStorage and display item count in the navbar. Include a checkout flow with delivery/takeaway selection, address entry, payment method selection, and an order confirmation screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Cart persists across page refreshes using localStorage
Navbar shows cart item count badge
Checkout flow has steps: order type → address → payment → confirmation
Order confirmation screen displays a summary of items ordered

requirements.text: Build a full-screen hero section on the homepage with a South Indian food background image, the restaurant name 'Coal & Curry', a tagline reflecting South Indian multi-cuisine, and CTA buttons linking to the Menu and Reservation pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is full viewport height
Restaurant name and tagline are clearly visible over the background
CTA buttons link correctly to /menu and /reservation

requirements.text: Create a Restaurant Details / Contact page showing the restaurant's name, address, phone number, email, WhatsApp link, opening hours (daily schedule), and social media links. Include a simple contact inquiry form.

quotes: Restaurant details — contact info, opening hours, and location

acceptanceCriteria: Address, phone, email, and opening hours are all displayed
WhatsApp link opens a WhatsApp chat
Contact form has name, email, and message fields with a submit confirmation state

requirements.text: Build a table reservation page with a form for name, phone number, date, time, number of guests, occasion (optional), and seating preference. On successful submission, display a reservation confirmation summary. Store reservations in the Motoko backend.
acceptanceCriteria: All required form fields are validated before submission
Reservation is saved to backend stable storage
Confirmation summary is displayed after successful submission

requirements.text: Add a Signature Dishes section on the homepage showcasing 4 featured South Indian specialties (e.g., Ghee Roast Dosa, Chettinad Pepper Chicken, Prawn Masala, Filter Coffee Dessert Platter) with images, short descriptions, prices, and Add to Cart buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 signature dishes are displayed in a grid on the homepage
Each card has an image, name, description, price, and Add to Cart button
Section links to the full menu page

requirements.text: Add a customer reviews section on the homepage that fetches reviews from the Motoko backend (with static fallback data) and displays them in a carousel with star ratings, reviewer name, and review text.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviews are fetched from backend with at least 4 static fallback entries
Star ratings are visually rendered
Carousel navigation (prev/next) works correctly

requirements.text: Add SEO metadata to all pages including title, meta description, Open Graph tags, and a JSON-LD Restaurant structured data block on the homepage. Update frontend/public/robots.txt and frontend/public/sitemap.xml to reflect all public routes.

quotes: If we search in google it will appear

acceptanceCriteria: Each page has a unique title and meta description
Homepage includes JSON-LD Restaurant schema
robots.txt allows all crawlers except /cart and /checkout
sitemap.xml lists all public routes

requirements.text: Include a floating chatbot widget ('Agni' assistant) fixed to the bottom-right corner. The chatbot should respond to keywords related to menu, hours, reservation, delivery, location, offers, and payment using pre-written static responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Chatbot toggle button is visible on all pages
Chatbot responds correctly to at least 8 keyword topics
Quick-reply shortcut buttons are available

requirements.text: Add a responsive Navbar with scroll-aware styling, mobile hamburger menu, cart item count badge, and links to Home, Menu, About, Gallery, Offers, Reservations, Blog, and Contact pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is responsive and collapses to hamburger on mobile
Cart badge shows correct item count
Navbar styling changes on scroll (e.g., transparent to solid background)

requirements.text: Add a site-wide Footer with brand description, social media links, quick navigation links, menu category links, contact details, and a newsletter signup form. Newsletter submissions should be stored in the Motoko backend with duplicate-check feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer appears on all pages
Newsletter form shows success, duplicate, or error feedback
All navigation links in footer are functional

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Generated dish and food images must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated
Do not use blue or purple as primary brand colors

required: Full-screen South Indian restaurant interior with warm golden lighting and banana leaf table settings, landscape (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Crispy golden Masala Dosa served with sambar and three chutneys on a banana leaf (masala-dosa.dim_600x400.png)
Soft white Idly served with sambar and coconut chutney in a traditional steel plate (idly-sambar.dim_600x400.png)
Chettinad Pepper Chicken curry in a clay pot with curry leaves and red chilies (chettinad-chicken.dim_600x400.png)
Aromatic Prawn Biryani garnished with fried onions and mint in a copper handi (prawn-biryani.dim_600x400.png)
Spicy Fish Curry in a thick coconut-based gravy served with steamed rice (fish-curry.dim_600x400.png)
Ghee Roast Dosa — paper-thin crispy dosa with ghee drizzle and red chutney (ghee-roast-dosa.dim_600x400.png)
Medu Vada — golden crispy lentil donuts served with coconut chutney and sambar (medu-vada.dim_600x400.png)
Onion Uttapam — thick rice pancake topped with onions, tomatoes, and green chilies (onion-uttapam.dim_600x400.png)
Vegetable Kothu Parotta — shredded parotta stir-fried with vegetables and spices (kothu-parotta.dim_600x400.png)
Kerala Fish Moilee — delicate white fish in coconut milk curry with green chilies (fish-moilee.dim_600x400.png)
Sambar Rice — steamed rice mixed with lentil sambar and ghee in a steel bowl (sambar-rice.dim_600x400.png)
Payasam — creamy South Indian vermicelli kheer with cashews and raisins in a silver bowl (payasam.dim_600x400.png)
Filter Coffee — frothy South Indian filter coffee in a traditional steel tumbler and dabarah (filter-coffee.dim_600x400.png)
Fresh Coconut Water served in a tender green coconut with a straw (coconut-water.dim_600x400.png)
Butter Chicken — rich tomato-cream chicken curry garnished with cream swirl and fenugreek (butter-chicken.dim_600x400.png)
Plain Parotta — flaky layered flatbread stacked on a banana leaf plate (plain-parotta.dim_600x400.png)
Mixed Veg Curry — colorful South Indian vegetable curry with mustard seeds and coconut (mixed-veg-curry.dim_600x400.png)
Coal & Curry restaurant logo — stylized flame over a curry pot with elegant serif text on dark background (logo.dim_400x400.png)
Offers section banner — festive South Indian food spread with banana leaves and brass lamps (offers-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
